docs.name: Cursor Trail
docs.description: Glowing trail that follows the cursor with decay physics, like a sparkler or comet tail.

props.name: color
props.description: The color of the trail particles.

props.name: trailLength
props.description: Maximum number of particles rendering concurrently.

props.name: size
props.description: Base size of the trailing particle dots.

props.name: decayDuration
props.description: How long it takes for a drawn particle to fade and shrink out.

docs.overview: CursorTrail renders a sequence of fading particles that follow the cursor across the page, creating a comet-like tail effect. Trail length, size, colour, and decay speed are all configurable.

scenarios.title: Magic wand cursor for interactive demos
scenarios.description: Enable a glowing trail on a dedicated demo page to delight visitors and signal interactivity.

scenarios.title: Brand-coloured trail on a landing page
scenarios.description: Match the trail colour to your primary brand colour for a cohesive, premium feel.

accessibility.screenReaderNotes: Cursor-only visual; no keyboard or screen-reader surface.
